item.text: I’ll read only `package.json` in the current package and summarize its contents.
I’ll read only `package.json` in the current package and summarize its contents.
I’ll inspect only `tsconfig.json` in the current package and summarize its TypeScript configuration.
I’ll inspect only `tsconfig.json` in the current package and summarize its TypeScript configuration.

`package.json` summary:

- Package name: `effect-codex-app-server`
- Metadata: `private: true`, `type: "module"`
- Exports:
  - `./client` -> `./src/client.ts`
  - `./schema` -> `./src/schema.ts`
  - `./rpc` -> `./src/rpc.ts`
  - `./protocol` -> `./src/protocol.ts`
  - `./errors` -> `./src/errors.ts`

Scripts:

```json
{
  "dev": "tsdown src/client.ts src/rpc.ts src/protocol.ts src/schema.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --watch --clean",
  "build": "tsdown src/client.ts src/rpc.ts src/protocol.ts src/schema.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --clean",
  "prepare": "effect-language-service patch",
  "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
  "test": "vitest run",
  "generate": "bun run scripts/generate.ts",
  "probe": "bun run test/examples/codex-app-server-probe.ts"
}
```

Dependencies:

```json
{
  "effect": "catalog:"
}
```

Dev dependencies:

```json
{
  "@effect/language-service": "catalog:",
  "@effect/openapi-generator": "catalog:",
  "@effect/platform-node": "catalog:",
  "@effect/vitest": "catalog:",
  "tsdown": "catalog:",
  "typescript": "catalog:",
  "vitest": "catalog:"
}
```

`compilerOptions` only defines a TypeScript plugin:

- `@effect/language-service`
- `namespaceImportPackages`: `["@effect/platform-node"]`
- Effect diagnostics:
  - `importFromBarrel`: `error`
  - `anyUnknownInErrorContext`: `warning`
  - `instanceOfSchema`: `warning`
  - `deterministicKeys`: `warning`

Project scope:

- `include`: `["src", "scripts", "test"]`
- No `exclude`
- No `files`
- No `references`

Notable configuration: most TypeScript behavior is inherited from the repo base config; this package mainly adds Effect language-service checks and includes source, scripts, and tests.
